summary_en: 29,600 shares acquired April 2026 at ¥22.3M via open-market purchase on TSE. Cumulative: 117,400 shares (0.71% S/O), ¥91.4M consumed of ¥200M authorized limit. Execution window: Dec 2025–Nov 2026.
title_en: Notification of Share Acquisition Status (Self-Repurchase under Company Law Article 459, Section 1 and Articles of Incorporation Article 8)
translation_en_brief: Space Shower Skiyaki Holdings reported share repurchase progress on 14 May 2026. During April 2026, the company acquired 29,600 ordinary shares via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange at a total cost of ¥22.3M. The board resolution from 13 November 2025 authorized a 12-month buyback program (December 2025 through November 2026) with an upper limit of 200,000 shares (1.22% of outstanding shares) and a spending cap of ¥200M. As of 30 April 2026, the company has cumulatively acquired 117,400 shares for ¥91.4M, representing 58.7% of the authorized share limit and 45.7% of the authorized yen limit.
